name: vibe-for-vscode
description: Speak your prompt (Chinese-first) and insert the transcription into Claude Code, Cline, Copilot Chat, or the active editor.

commands.title: Vibe: Toggle Voice Recording / 开始·停止录音
Vibe: Cancel Recording / 取消录音
Vibe: Set License Key / 设置授权密钥
Vibe: Clear License Key / 清除授权密钥

vibe.endpoint.markdownDescription: Cloudflare Worker base URL, e.g. `https://vibe-voice-worker.<account>.workers.dev` (no trailing slash).

vibe.language.markdownDescription: ISO-639-1 language passed explicitly to Whisper (bypasses auto-detection latency). Default `zh`.

vibe.maxRecordSeconds.markdownDescription: Auto-stop recording after this many seconds (Note: Cloudflare Workers AI may have hard limits on extremely long payloads, e.g. >120s).

enumDescriptions: Active editor cursor → active terminal → agent chat input → clipboard fallback
Always insert at the active editor cursor
Always send to the active terminal (no newline)
Always copy to clipboard and notify
Always pre-fill the active Copilot/Agent chat panel input box
vibe.insertTarget.markdownDescription: Where to insert the transcribed text. `auto` will detect active editor or terminal, then fallback to chat/clipboard.

vibe.ffmpegPath.markdownDescription: Absolute path to the `ffmpeg` binary. Leave empty to use `ffmpeg` from PATH.

vibe.audioDevice.markdownDescription: Input device override. macOS avfoundation index (e.g. `:0`), Windows dshow name (e.g. `audio=Microphone (USB)`), Linux pulse source. Empty = platform default.

vibe.contextHint.markdownDescription: Extract identifiers from the active editor + recent filenames and send them as a vocabulary hint (Whisper `initial_prompt`) so code terms transcribe accurately.
